content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates intelligent, articulate resistance without tripping any priority AoA anti-patterns. He does not fight the resistance (turn 7's 'almost defensive' is a two-word naming, not an argument); does not abandon the experiment when the client declares 'I can't' (turn 9 reroutes rather than rescues); does not lecture before the experiential data exists (the pattern is named at turn 13 only AFTER the client produced it herself at turn 10); does not collude with the silverware metaphor intellectualization (turn 15 acknowledges briefly then redirects to lived experience); and at turn 21 makes a precision correction on the client's own word ('protecting') rather than evangelizing or fixing. There is no loving-to-transform vigor, no view-as-technique coldness, no wonder-as-strategy question stacking, no safety-as-control, and no advice-giving. The directness is methodology-correct for a controlling/chasing client — more space would feed the pattern. The client baits the coach repeatedly (flipping the question at turn 2, declaring incapacity at turn 8, producing a defensive metaphor at turn 14, escaping into meta-argument at turn 20), and the coach declines each bait gracefully.",
  "evidence_turns": [3, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19, 21],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Sets up an embodied experiment frame, which earns the right to redirect later without it being correction."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the bait of answering the flipped question; turns it into self-observation. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doubles down on experiment with specificity — not half-assing the experiment."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names resistance as 'almost defensive' in two words — does not fight the voice, does not make client wrong."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client declares 'I can't' — coach does not rescue or reassure, reroutes the experiment."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Crystallizes what happened in one sentence — no evangelizing, no methodology jargon."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the universal pattern only after client produced the data herself — avoids explain-before-feel."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to argue at the metaphor level; redirects to experiential question. Avoids colluding with intellectualization."},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Bypasses last-line defense by routing through the other person's POV — no fighting."},
    {"turn": 19, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Direct mirror question without charge — not making client wrong."},
    {"turn": 21, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Precision correction using the client's own word — avoids meta-argument trap without shaming."},
    {"turn": 23, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lands the integration cleanly without victory-lap or evangelism."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["frame-it-as-an-experiment", "name-the-resistance-as-it-happens", "redirect-to-the-experiment-without-shame", "expose-the-meta-pattern-as-the-finding", "control-correction-on-language", "how-much-of-that-was-X", "how-do-you-respond", "how-is-that-not-also-X"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Calibration note from profile heeded: the directness here is methodology-correct, not charged. No anti-pattern trips."
}
